name: Shannon Jackson, Our Revolution
subject: Join the People's Climate March
body:
We need to take action now to preserve our planet and a future for the next generation.
#
Friends,
The political revolution continues this Saturday with the People's Climate March, and Our Revolution wants you to join our local supporters as we march together for our environment. We need to take action now to preserve our planet and a future for the next generation.
[**People's Climate March**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d3f/43f17890/dac1a461/6203b682/1418618661/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/pcm-meet?source=em170425-dc")
Union Station
50 Massachusetts Ave NE, Washington, DC 20002
Saturday, April 29, 10:30 AM - 11:30 AM EDT
**[RSVP TO ATTEND»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d3f/43f17890/dac1a461/6203b682/1418618661/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/pcm-meet?source=em170425-dc")**
We have the opportunity to reinvent our energy economy with energy independence and the growth of millions of green jobs. There is no question that our country is being held back by the greed and self-interest of the fossil fuel industry, so the People's Climate March is a demonstration of _our_ self-interest.
Join us for the largest action in support of environmental justice since Trump took office. Our Revolution and our supporters will don special Climate March shirts and march together, united with more than 100,000 climate activists as we partake in a mass sit-in that surrounds the White House, making sure that the current administration hears us loud and clear that we won't stand for climate denial.
We see the denial of science, the violence inflicted upon communities of color that the fossil fuel industry considers "lesser-than," and the catastrophic effects that climate change is having on our earth, and we say: Enough is enough.
[**Join Our Revolution at the People's Climate March in Washington this Saturday to stand up to the fossil fuel industry and the establishment that keeps them in power.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d3f/43f17890/dac1a461/6203b682/1418618661/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/pcm-meet?source=em170425-dc")
The People's Climate March is a watershed moment for our planet, our future, and Our Revolution. I look forward to seeing you there with us.
In solidarity,
Shannon Jackson
Executive Director
Our Revolution
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d3f/43f17890/dac1a461/6203b683/1418618661/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d3f/43f17890/dac1a461/6203b680/1418618661/VEsD/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d3f/43f17890/dac1a461/6203b681/1418618661/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Marco Rubio
subject: SURVEY: First 100 Days

body:
Friend, can you let me know what you think by answering this very quick survey?
| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/41949071:sYGe0u2NC:m:1:1328517760:A87F003C555563323CB99BD08E7A5B58:r)
---
Friend,

We are approaching a historic milestone -- the first 100 Days of an Administration and Congress.

It has been an incredible 100 days, we've been able to achieve a lot but there's still MUCH to accomplish.

**But, Friend, I want to hear from you.**

| [** FIRST 100 DAYS SURVEY
START NOW >>>>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/41949071:sYGe0u2NC:m:1:1328517760:A87F003C555563323CB99BD08E7A5B58:r)
---

_**I want to know what you want to see happen and what issues you want to see tackled. Are you happy with how the first 100 days have gone? Are there certain issues you would like to see Congress take action on?**_

**[Just as I did as we began this new year, I have asked my staff to help me put together a quick survey to find out what YOU think.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/41949071:sYGe0u2NC:m:1:1328517760:A87F003C555563323CB99BD08E7A5B58:r)**

It will just take you a minute to fill out and would mean a lot to me if you did.

[** FIRST 100 DAYS SURVEY

Marco Rubio

1600 Daily Everything White House for 4/26/2017. |White House Memo
President Donald J. Trump is committed to building an economy that works for all Americans, not just the chosen few. Today, he will roll out the first details of his tax plan, which will reform the complicated tax code, slash rates, and empower companies and workers to create jobs and keep more of their money in their own pockets.

- 12:30PM: President Trump has lunch with Vice President Pence

subject: FWD: Wish the First Lady a happy birthday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Have you wished the First Lady a happy birthday yet? |

Friend, Wanted to be sure you saw this. President Trump has asked for everyone to join him in celebrating the First Lady’s birthday TODAY! Family and friends are always included in birthday celebrations and the President wanted to be sure you had the chance to sign the official birthday card before the big day is over. There’s no better way to celebrate. Please, join the President in making this a birthday our First Lady will never forget. Sign the official birthday card before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT! Sincerely, Team TRUMP SIGN THE CARD ---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: April 25, 2017 at 5:04 PM Subject: Wish the First Lady a happy birthday To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend, It has been a memorable year, and we’re just getting started. I’ve been so lucky to have the best woman by my side throughout the campaign, and now as our country’s greatest First Lady. As you may know, on April 26, we will be celebrating Melania’s birthday and I want you to be a part of our celebration. We always include family and close friends, and you have been one of our most loyal supporters in the fight to Make America Great Again! I want all of our great supporters to please sign Melania’s official card and include a personal message wishing her a very happy birthday.
You have meant so much to our success, and I know the First Lady will be thrilled to hear from you on this special day. I want to be able to show her the millions of supporters she has all across the country, so I will be sharing this card with her on her special day. Join us in making this a birthday our First Lady will never forget. Sign the official card before Melania’s birthday on April 26. Best, Donald J. Trump President of the United States P.S. Please join me in celebrating the birthday of our incredible First Lady, a true champion of women, and my beautiful wife, Melania, by signing her card now.

SIGN THE CARD

I want all of our great supporters to please sign Melania’s official card and include a personal message wishing her a very happy birthday. You have meant so much to our success, and I know the First Lady will be thrilled to hear from you on this special day. I want to be able to show her the millions of supporters she has all across the country, so I will be sharing this card with her on her special day. Join us in making this a birthday our First Lady will never forget. Sign the official card before Melania’s birthday on April 26. Best, Donald J. Trump President of the United States P.S. Please join me in celebrating the birthday of our incredible First Lady, a true champion of women, and my beautiful wife, Melania, by signing her card now. name: Tom Perez
subject: re: 100 days of resistance
body:
Help us keep fighting
---
**Donald Trump will mark 100 days in office this week -- and we'll celebrate 100 days of resistance. Help us keep fighting by becoming a Founding Donor to our 100 Day Resistance Fund:
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c874/4067b0a/2f50a03ba/7e75cff7/4100366682/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/100-Day-Resistance-Fund-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170426_tp_nd&source=em_20170426_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170426_tp_nd")****
On Saturday, it will have been 100 days since Donald Trump assumed America's highest office.

He promised to drain the swamp, but instead, he stocked it with bigger alligators -- from bigots like Jeff Sessions to people like Betsy DeVos and Steven Mnuchin making up the wealthiest Cabinet in history.

He promised to improve the lives of millions of Americans, but everything he has done has accomplished the exact opposite at the expense of American families.

On his first very day in office, he made it harder to save for retirement and for first-time homebuyers to buy a home.

Fear and hatred have been the driving force behind policies that demonize immigrants, tear apart families, and punish innocent refugees.

His proposed budget cuts job training, mental health services, and rural economic development programs. He's even chasing funds from Meals on Wheels and money that helps seniors warm their homes during the winter just so he can give millionaires and billionaires a tax break. All while he's spent an estimated $25 million in taxpayer money on golf vacations -- he spent 19 of his first 90 days at a Trump-branded resort.

For 100 days, Donald Trump has broken promise after promise as hardworking Americans paid the price. And we're fighting back.

Folks like you in Virginia and all over this country have shown up at town halls, at airports, at rallies. You've marched and made phone calls to save affordable health care, stop a Muslim ban, defeat an anti-worker Cabinet nominee, and so much more.

The hallmark of Donald Trump's first 100 days in office will be resistance. Let's make sure we're able to keep resisting for the next hundred, and the hundred after that, and on until Donald Trump is out of office for good.

Become a Founding Donor today to our 100 Day Resistance Fund, which we'll use to elect Democrats who will resist Trump in every state and at every level of government. Together, we can turn our passion into victory at the ballot box in every community.

Team,
While the country was focused on Trump's extreme Supreme Court nominee, he and his administration quietly passed an invasive law that allows Internet service providers to sell your private information.
Most of us use the Internet to make our everyday lives easier. Whether we're paying bills, doing research, or making travel plans, odds are that we have our credit card information and other important data stored online. This information should belong to YOU, not corporate special interests.
**We can't let Washington Republicans get away with destroying critical privacy protections for millions of Americans.** [**Add your name to tell Congress that our online information is not for sale.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd73/2a380d31/157c050d/fef86a/2959307/VEsF/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/defendourprivacy/?code=Hassan&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fcontribute%2Fpage%2F2017april_internetprivacy-ja%3Frefcode%3D320170419_internetprivacyja_all")
This bill doesn't do anything to help hard-working families. Instead, it gives corporate special interests the green light to use your private information to make a profit.
The GOP is prioritizing large businesses and their corporate backers over our privacy, and we can't let them get away with it.
[**Sign now to tell Washington Republicans that you won't stand for their attempts to rip away our privacy and compromise our personal information.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd73/2a380d31/157c050d/fef86a/2959307/VEsC/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/defendourprivacy/?code=Hassan&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fcontribute%2Fpage%2F2017april_internetprivacy-ja%3Frefcode%3D320170419_internetprivacyja_all")

---

Desperate to accomplish something in his first hundred days, Donald Trump is rolling out his "tax reform plan" today.

It's a giant tax cut for big corporations -- including the Trump Organization! -- to be paid for by eliminating tax deductions used by middle-class families.

subject: Tracking down legislators in the halls
body:
This model will work. But we need to make sure we have the resources to do it. | [](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46c5/1c469400/2c74af2/3549061/829362030/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/legitpac_donate?refcode=20170426_r4w_NPV_report_back&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20170426_r4w_NPV_report_back&source=20170426_r4w_NPV_report_back") Friend, It would be nearly impossible to eliminate the Electoral College through a constitutional amendment right now. But we don't need to. Instead, we've been pushing for the National Popular Vote Interstate Compact in Connecticut. The Compact would effectively neutralize the Electoral College and no more, and we can pass it state by state. It's the kind of opportunity we started LegitAction to fight for. We chose Connecticut because the legislature is close to passing a bill to support the national popular vote, but key members of the General Assembly are wavering. So we've helped organize local LegitAction supporters to sign petitions, make phone calls, and even track down legislators in the halls of the state capitol. Now we're building national support for this effort. But in order to continue our work, we need to raise another $12,406 in grassroots contributions by the end of the month. [_**Contribute $3 today to help raise the last $12,406 in grassroots contributions to meet LegitAction 's budget goal by the end of the month.**_](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46c5/1c469400/2c74af2/354909e/829362030/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/legitpac_donate?refcode=20170426_r4w_NPV_report_back&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=2+-+Contribute+3+today+to+help+raise+the+las&utm_campaign=20170426_r4w_NPV_report_back&source=20170426_r4w_NPV_report_back") That's how this works. We don't have progressive majorities in Congress or a progressive in the White House. But we do have important and urgent priorities we can actually accomplish, without help from Washington, that will help restore legitimacy to our democracy. We just have to get a little creative to find these opportunities -- and we are. LegitAction supporters have stepped up to help gather 1,191 signatures on our popular vote petition in Connecticut. And 23,141 more have stepped up to add their names to our national petition. This model of building a national profile for issues, then implementing those issues state-by-state, will work. But we need to make sure we have the resources to do it. [_**Make sure we have the resources to keep building a national profile for legitimacy and implementing local changes. Contribute $3 today, before the month ends.**_](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46c5/1c469400/2c74af2/354909f/829362030/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/legitpac_donate?refcode=20170426_r4w_NPV_report_back&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=3+-+Make+sure+we+have+the+resources+to+keep+&utm_campaign=20170426_r4w_NPV_report_back&source=20170426_r4w_NPV_report_back") The national popular vote is just one area where we can make a difference. In the coming months, we can impact issues like gerrymandering, voter ID, and more. Thank you for standing up for our democratic legitimacy today, LegitPAC Team | [CONTRIBUTE](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46c5/1c469400/2c74af2/354909c/829362030/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/legitpac_donate?refcode=20170426_r4w_NPV_report_back&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=4+-+CONTRIBUTE&utm_campaign=20170426_r4w_NPV_report_back&source=20170426_r4w_NPV_report_back")

name: Geoff Burgan
subject: on the road
body:
Let's bring it home.
#
Team --
As one of the few members of our small, but mighty, Team Gillum staff, I end up spending a lot of time with Andrew on the road. And last week, when we were driving back from a townhall meeting in Brevard County, Andrew turned to me and said:
_" Man, they gave me ENERGY tonight!"_
Now, let me be clear why this is such a big deal: we're traveling all over Florida, and Andrew is the father of twin toddlers, with another baby boy on the way in just a few short weeks. It can be exhausting - even for someone like Andrew.
But the energy on this campaign is contagious -- and if you've been to an event with us, you know exactly what I'm talking about. And this is going to be what sets us apart from every other campaign in the state and the nation -- this energy, excitement and optimism.
[**Will you help us keep up the momentum and energy in this campaign by chipping in $20 or whatever you can afford before our end of month deadline?**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb339f/9e00690/49db31e5/2403438b/2793452042/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-april2017?refcode=em20170426-geoff")
Now more than ever, we need to stand up together for our future. I hope you'll join us.
Bring it home,
Geoff Burgan
Communications Director
Andrew Gillum for Governor

Last month, House Speaker Paul Ryan, with Donald Trump's backing, introduced a bill that would dismantle some of the most important parts of the Affordable Care Act.

Americans saw what was in the Republican bill -- and they didn't like it one bit. The outcry was so great that Speaker Ryan pulled it before a floor vote.

body:
Last night, congressional Republicans snuck in an amendment to their second attempt at health care repeal -- and it's outrageous.
---
[****](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e064/2b07114c/5c1a1b5b/736d9c04/643545550/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/stop-repeal?source=DPE-20170426-AddYourName_DS-ProsHV")
Team,

Last night, congressional Republicans snuck in an amendment to their second attempt at health care repeal that would exempt members of Congress from their efforts to rollback health care coverage.

And it's already won Paul Ryan the support of the House Freedom Caucus to move it through Congress.

We cannot allow Republicans to create one set of special rules for themselves, while passing a disastrous health care bill that would hurt everyone else.

[**Add your name right now to tell the GOP: we will not let you repeal ObamaCare and exempt yourselves from the consequences.**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e064/2b07114c/5c1a1b5b/736d9c04/643545550/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/stop-repeal?source=DPE-20170426-AddYourName_DS-ProsHV")

Thanks to ObamaCare, insurers can't deny coverage to people with pre-existing coverage. Insurance plans are also required to cover essential services like maternity care and mental health care.

Now Republicans in Congress want to roll back those protections for middle class families -- but not for themselves!

Congressional Republicans know just how harmful their health care repeal plan would be, and that's why they're trying to quietly opt-out. We can't let them get away with it.

**Tell the GOP: if you like the protections of ObamaCare enough to keep them for yourselves, then don 't repeal ObamaCare for others:**

name: Shannon Jackson, Our Revolution
subject: Join our Bystander Training with CASA
body:
The April 30 Bystander Training is Our Revolution-PG's first step locally to build a rapid response network
#
Friends,
Our Revolution-Prince George's County is excited to host a Bystander Training this Sunday with CASA, one of Maryland's leading immigrant rights organizations. The next day, we will march with workers and immigrants from all over the DMV area to stand up for the working class on May Day.
The April 30 Bystander Training is Our Revolution-PG's first step locally to build a rapid response network to stop the Trump administration from breaking up our families and communities. [**RSVP today to attend this critical training.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d3e/43f17890/dac28fed/6203b5a7/3878484539/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/event/detail/gpgmmr?source=em170426-dmv")
[**CASA Bystander Training**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d3e/43f17890/dac28fed/6203b5a7/3878484539/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/event/detail/gpgmmr?source=em170426-dmv")
Hyattsville Municipal Building
4310 Gallatin St, Hyattsville, MD 20781
Sunday, April 30, 2:00 PM - 4:00 PM EDT
**[RSVP TO ATTEND»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d3e/43f17890/dac28fed/6203b5a7/3878484539/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/event/detail/gpgmmr?source=em170426-dmv")**
May 1st was chosen for May Day to commemorate the Haymarket Affair and is internationally recognized as a day to celebrate, appreciate, and acknowledge the working class. It has grown into a day to fight for the rights of immigrant workers in this country. Let's revisit the history of May Day, remind the world of its origin, and let the holiday become a symbol of the working class once again.
[**May Day Action**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d3e/43f17890/dac28fed/6203b5a4/3878484539/VEsC/ "https://www.maydayaction.com/what-we-do/")
DuPont Circle Metro
1525 20th St NW, Washington, DC 20036
Monday, May 1, 2:00 PM - 6:00 PM EDT
CASA and Our Revolution invite you to learn how to protect our communities against detention, raids, and aggression, and learn about the exciting May 1st May Day rally in support of immigrant and worker's rights!
In today's political climate, we need to stay informed about our constitutional rights and stand with our immigrant and Muslim sisters and brothers. The Bystander Training with CASA will give you the tools to make a real difference for the people in our PG County community. It is essential that we stand together against the racism and divisiveness that threatens to tear our families apart. [**RSVP to reserve your spot at Sunday's training.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d3e/43f17890/dac28fed/6203b5a7/3878484539/VEsD/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/event/detail/gpgmmr?source=em170426-dmv")
Thank you. Your action can be the difference in keeping our families and friends together and safe from harm.
In solidarity,
Our Revolution-PG County
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d3e/43f17890/dac28fed/6203b5a5/3878484539/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d3e/43f17890/dac28fed/6203b5a2/3878484539/VEsB/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d3e/43f17890/dac28fed/6203b5a3/3878484539/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").
